creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
I think I have found the issue and the fix. I am going to add the patches for the gcc -devel ports to the bug report and start committing them together with the weekly snapshots. Then I will fix the gcc standard ports too.

For now, I have tested the patch for gcc11-devel successfully. I am still testing the other patches. Mind that it is necessary to disable ASLR to run successfully the compiled binaries, which can de done with

# sysctl kern.elf64.aslr.pie_enable=1
# sysctl kern.elf64.aslr.enable=1
